author: SantiMod
content:
Star Atlas Town Hall confirmed! 
 
 Join us this Friday at 3 PM PST (10 PM UTC), here on Discord for a traditional Star Atlas Town Hall!

What’s in store:
 Airdrop of the exclusive Star Atlas x Radium Defy Skin for Pearce X5 (Snapshot has been taken!)
Updates on everything related to Star Atlas 
 You'll be able to talk directly with @SW4GN3R and our dev team!

Mentions: @SW4GN3R
